title: ATARI — SING engine with VEC02X (Robotron)
tldr: SING preset using `VEC02X` — possibly an homage to a specific Atari arcade sound (the name suggests so).
how: Single-oscillator SING engine with the `VEC02X` parameter block. Different envelope / pitch shape than HSTD.
watch: SING engine readouts; A/B against HSTD.
